summary: Iteration 174 — Backend Refactoring Verification. Major split of commessa_ops.py (3,430 lines) into 6 modular files + 1 thin wrapper. ALL 17 TESTS PASSED (100%). Verified: (1) Health endpoint returns healthy, (2) 70 commesse routes registered (target was 69), (3) Critical routes respond with 401 (auth required) not 404, (4) Backward compatibility imports work (_extract_profile_base, _normalize_profilo, get_commessa_or_404, ensure_ops_fields), (5) Python lint passes on all new files, (6) Margin service still importable. FIXED: Missing uuid/base64 imports in conto_lavoro.py, consegne_ops.py, documenti_ops.py that would have caused runtime errors.

minor.issue: F841 unused variable 'doc' at line 180 and E701/E702 multiple statements on one line (style warnings, non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: commessa_ops.py (wrapper): Clean 29-line file that includes 5 sub-routers and re-exports backward compatibility functions
commessa_ops_common.py: Shared helpers (get_commessa_or_404, ensure_ops_fields, ts, new_id, push_event, build_update_with_event)
FIXED: conto_lavoro.py was missing 'import uuid' and 'import base64' - would have caused NameError at runtime
FIXED: consegne_ops.py was missing 'import uuid' - would have caused NameError at runtime
FIXED: documenti_ops.py was missing 'import uuid' and build_update_with_event in imports - would have caused NameError at runtime
All sub-modules correctly import from commessa_ops_common.py for shared utilities
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/documenti_ops.py (added uuid import, added build_update_with_event to imports)
test_credentials: N/A - tests use unauthenticated route checks (401 verification)
seed_data_creation: None required - tests verify route registration via 401 responses
